items.title: Finnish phone-maker HMD bundles Indian AI chatbot onto new smartphone in push to reach local market
items.summary: HMD is pre-loading Sarvam's Indus chatbot app, which supports 22 Indic languages

items.title: Waymo expands pause to four cities as robotaxis keep driving into floods
items.summary: Waymo's robotaxi service is now suspended in both Atlanta and San Antonio, as the company works to stop its vehicles from driving into flooded roads.

items.title: SpaceX scrubs first Starship V3 launch just before liftoff
items.summary: SpaceX fueled the third-generation rocket booster and ship and was just moments away from liftoff, before calling a scrub. It's expected to try again Friday.

items.title: Who will benefit most from SpaceX IPO? Mostly Elon — and a few from his inner circle
items.summary: Elon Musk has the largest stake in SpaceX by billions of shares. The other biggest shareholders also have longstanding and deep ties to Musk.

items.title: Waymo halts freeway rides after robotaxis struggle in construction zones
items.summary: The service suspension comes as Waymo has also paused operations in Atlanta and San Antonio after its robotaxis drove into flooded streets.

items.title: NYC Mayor Zohran Mamdani takes to Twitch to chat with New Yorkers
items.summary: New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani is launching a Twitch series today at 4 p.m. ET.

items.title: Spotify and Universal Music strike deal allowing fan-made AI covers and remixes
items.summary: Spotify is partnering with  Universal Music Group￼ to let Premium subscribers create AI-generated song covers and remixes, with participating artists receiving a share of the revenue.

items.title: How Elon Musk will increase his power through the SpaceX IPO
items.summary: Musk, who will have more than 50% of the voting power, will have a monarchical grip over the publicly-traded version of SpaceX — control that goes far beyond what other tech founders enjoy.

items.title: Law enforcement shuts down VPN service used by two dozen ransomware gangs
items.summary: First VPN promised hackers complete anonymity for their cyberattacks. But Europol said it was able to notify the service’s users that they have now been identified.

items.title: Six search engines worth trying now that Google isn’t really Google anymore
items.summary: Google is about to look really different, and if you're not a fan of the AI overview feature, then you're not going to like what's coming.

items.title: Convective Capital raises an $85 million fund to build disaster resilience
items.summary: After launching to invest in fire tech, Convective is broadening its mandate to disaster resilience.

items.title: Trump delays AI security executive order, saying language ‘could have been a blocker’
items.summary: President Trump delayed signing an executive order that would have required pre-release government security reviews of AI models, citing dissatisfaction with the order's language.

items.title: This young startup is taking on a fragrance industry that hasn’t changed in almost half a century
items.summary: Fragrance tech company Patina announced Thursday a $2 million raise from investors, including Betaworks and True Ventures.

items.title: Spotify takes on Google’s NotebookLM with its new app
items.summary: Spotify is releasing the new desktop app as a research preview in more than 20 markets.

items.title: Spotify adds AI-powered Q&A and briefing generation features to podcasts
items.summary: Spotify will let you generate daily or weekly briefs based on your prompts

items.title: Spotify launches an ElevenLabs-powered audiobook creation tool
items.summary: The AI-powered audiobook generation won't bind authors to an exclusive contract, meaning they are free to publish their generated audiobooks anywhere.

items.title: Spotify will reserve tickets for top fans of an artists in a bid to drum up engagement
items.summary: Spotify said that it will monitor activity like streams and shares to determine who is a top fan

items.title: The Path, founded by Tony Robbins and Calm alums, hopes to offer safer AI therapy
items.summary: The Path says its AI model has scored 95 on the mental health safety AI benchmark, Vera-MH. This compares to a top score of 65 for the consumer bots.

items.title: Hark raises $700M Series A for its secretive ‘universal’ AI interface
items.summary: Hark expects to release its first multimodal models this summer, which it says will power a personal AI platform that works with existing products and services. The company expects to follow that with hardware devices built specifically for those systems.

items.title: Maka Kids is redefining kids’ screen time with a streaming app optimized for well-being, not engagement
items.summary: Maka Kids is building a streaming app for children ages zero to six featuring content designed for healthy development. The startup has now raised $3 million in seed funding to scale its platform.
